batch_theme: AI x Gaming Intersection - Tier 1 Targets

vc_targets.location: San Francisco, CA / Los Angeles, CA
vc_targets.investment_thesis: Invests in transformative people and technology at the pre-seed and seed stage. Deep focus on XR, AI, and spatial computing. Founded by early Oculus investor with strong thesis on immersive technologies and AI-powered experiences.
vc_targets.ai_gaming_thesis: Active investor in AI-powered spatial experiences and immersive entertainment. Portfolio includes multiple companies at the intersection of AI and interactive media. Strong conviction on AI-native content creation tools and procedural generation.

primary_contact.name: Greg Castle
primary_contact.title: Managing Partner
primary_contact.background: Early investor in Oculus VR before Facebook acquisition. Deep expertise in spatial computing, XR, and AI. Former product leader with technical background in emerging platforms.

vc_targets.personalized_hook: Greg - Your early conviction in Oculus and Rec Room shows you understand how new interaction paradigms reshape entertainment. Our AI sourcing engine identifies pre-launch spatial computing teams with 85%+ accuracy, directly supporting your thesis on AI-native immersive experiences.
warm_intro_paths: Portfolio companies: Rec Room, Hidden Door
vc_targets.strategic_fit_analysis: Anorak is the ideal early-stage partner for AI x Gaming at the pre-seed/seed stage. Greg Castle's Oculus background provides deep empathy for platform shifts. Strong network in spatial computing aligns with next-gen gaming infrastructure. Check size fits pre-seed rounds perfectly.

portfolio_overlap.potential_synergies: Portfolio companies building AI tools for 3D content creation

vc_targets.investment_thesis: Pioneering gaming seed fund since 2005. Invests exclusively in interactive entertainment ecosystem. Deep operational expertise from backing Supercell, Unity, Playfish, NaturalMotion. Recent focus on AI-powered game development and generative content tools.
vc_targets.ai_gaming_thesis: Recently announced investment in Jam & Tea Studios leveraging AI for novel game experiences. Actively seeking AI-native game studios and ML tooling for game development. Strong thesis on procedural content generation and AI-assisted creativity.

primary_contact.name: David Gardner
primary_contact.title: General Partner & Co-Founder
primary_contact.background: 30+ years in gaming sector. Former EA executive. Led investments in Supercell, Unity, Playfish. Deep network in European gaming ecosystem.

alternative_contact.name: Matt Bilbey
alternative_contact.title: Venture Partner
alternative_contact.background: Former EVP at EA, led EA Partners. Recently joined LVP as Venture Partner based in Vancouver.

vc_targets.personalized_hook: David - Your recent Jam & Tea investment signals clear intent in AI-native gaming. Our engine identified that studio 8 months before their raise. We're seeing 40+ similar teams at the intersection of generative AI and novel gameplay mechanics - exactly the next wave LVP has historically caught early.
vc_targets.strategic_fit_analysis: LVP is the definitive European gaming seed fund with unmatched track record. Recent AI gaming investments validate thesis alignment. David Gardner's Supercell/Unity experience provides pattern recognition for breakout hits. Ideal for seed-stage AI gaming studios.

portfolio_overlap.potential_synergies: AI tooling for Unity developers, generative content platforms

vc_targets.investment_thesis: Exclusive focus on interactive entertainment. Invests from product inception through global scaling. Team of former Riot Games, Activision Blizzard, and Supercell leaders. Deep operational expertise in live ops, monetization, and global game launches.
vc_targets.ai_gaming_thesis: Recent investments in AI-powered gaming infrastructure including Donutbrowser.ai. Actively seeking AI-native studios and ML tooling for game development. Strong conviction on AI for player personalization, content generation, and live ops optimization.

recent_investments.focus: Mobile puzzle games with AI personalization

primary_contact.name: Michael Cheung
primary_contact.title: General Partner
primary_contact.background: Former Riot Games executive. Led investments in Dream Games, Spyke Games. Deep expertise in F2P mobile games and live operations.

alternative_contact.name: Jay Chi
alternative_contact.title: Managing Partner
alternative_contact.background: Former McKinsey, co-founded Makers Fund in 2017. Led fund strategy and major investments across gaming ecosystem.

vc_targets.personalized_hook: Michael - Makers' recent Donutbrowser.ai investment signals clear intent in AI-powered gaming infrastructure. Our sourcing engine identified 3 similar teams in the past quarter building AI-native discovery and distribution layers. These pre-launch signals typically precede breakout rounds by 6-9 months.
warm_intro_paths: Portfolio companies: Dream Games, Spyke Games alumni
Events: Gamescom, Tokyo Game Show, Pocket Gamer Connects
vc_targets.strategic_fit_analysis: Makers Fund is the most active gaming VC globally with unmatched operational expertise. Recent AI infrastructure investments validate thesis fit. Team includes former Riot/Activision operators who understand technical differentiation. Check sizes fit Series A ambitions.

portfolio_overlap.potential_synergies: AI tools for portfolio companies' live ops and content pipelines

vc_targets.investment_thesis: Gaming, generative AI, and entertainment technology fund. Backed by strategic LPs including Square Enix, Bandai Namco, and DeNA. Bridges Eastern and Western gaming markets. Strong focus on AI-native content creation and emerging market gaming platforms.
vc_targets.ai_gaming_thesis: Explicit focus on generative AI in 2025 thesis. Recently invested in Mage (AI content creation) and multiple AI-powered gaming studios. Strong conviction on AI for game development workflows and emerging market gaming infrastructure.

recent_investments.focus: India-based gaming platform with AI features
Gaming lifestyle brand with AI engagement

primary_contact.name: Teppei Tsutsui
primary_contact.title: Managing Partner
primary_contact.background: Founded GFR Fund in 2016. Former Gree executive. Deep connections in Japanese gaming ecosystem and Silicon Valley. Led investments across 3 funds.

alternative_contact.name: Patrick Montague
alternative_contact.title: General Partner
alternative_contact.background: Joined as GP in 2024. Former investment banking and gaming M&A experience. Focusing on AI and emerging market investments.

vc_targets.personalized_hook: Teppei - GFR's 2025 thesis on generative AI aligns perfectly with our pipeline. Our engine surfaced Mage 5 months before your investment by tracking talent movements from major AI labs into gaming applications. We're seeing similar signals from 15+ teams building AI-native content workflows.
warm_intro_paths: Strategic LPs: Square Enix, Bandai Namco
vc_targets.strategic_fit_analysis: GFR Fund offers unique access to Japanese gaming giants through strategic LP relationships. Explicit AI thesis for 2025 with recent investments validating conviction. Strong emerging market focus (India, SE Asia, Africa) opens distribution channels. Check sizes fit pre-seed through Series A.

portfolio_overlap.potential_synergies: Strategic partnerships with Square Enix/Bandai Namco for portfolio companies

vc_targets.investment_thesis: Dedicated fund for independent game developers globally. Revenue-share model alongside traditional equity. Founded by industry veterans from Ubisoft, Tencent, Xbox. Strong focus on artistic vision and innovative gameplay. Recently expanding into AI-assisted development tools.
vc_targets.ai_gaming_thesis: Exploring AI as a tool to empower small indie teams to compete with AAA studios. Interested in AI-assisted art pipelines, procedural generation, and AI-enhanced narrative systems. Focus on preserving artistic vision while leveraging AI for productivity.

recent_investments.focus: Indie tactical shooter with AI elements

primary_contact.name: Alexis Garavaryan
primary_contact.title: CEO & Co-Founder
primary_contact.background: Former Ubisoft, ID@Xbox, Tencent. Founded Kowloon Nights in 2017. Also co-founded Kepler Interactive. Deep expertise in indie publishing and game development funding.

alternative_contact.name: Jay Chi
alternative_contact.title: Co-Founder
alternative_contact.background: Also co-founder of Makers Fund. Consultant with deep gaming industry network.

vc_targets.personalized_hook: Alexis - Your Kepler Interactive model proves indie studios can scale with the right support. We're seeing a wave of 20+ AI-native indie teams that can achieve AAA production values with <10 people. Our engine identifies these teams based on art pipeline innovation signals before they announce.
warm_intro_paths: Portfolio companies: Kepler Interactive, Redhill Games
vc_targets.strategic_fit_analysis: Kowloon Nights offers unique revenue-share model alongside equity for early-stage indies. Alexis Garavaryan's Kepler Interactive success validates thesis. Strong focus on artistic vision aligns with AI as empowerment tool rather than replacement. Ideal for pre-seed AI indie studios.

portfolio_overlap.potential_synergies: Kepler Interactive publishing partnerships for portfolio companies

unique_value_propositions: Anorak: Early-stage XR/AI expertise, Oculus DNA
LVP: Supercell/Unity track record, European gaming network
Makers Fund: Riot/Activision operators, largest gaming fund
GFR Fund: Square Enix/Bandai Namco strategic access
Kowloon Nights: Indie-focused revenue-share model, Kepler network
